item.title: How to Investigate Suspicious User Activity Across Multiple SaaS Applications
item.description: Learn how security teams can investigate cross-SaaS threats, spot real risks, and streamline incident response with consistent, efficient strategies.

item.title: SaaS Security Risks and Mitigation: How to Close Your Security Gaps
item.description: Learn about SaaS security risks and mitigation to close your organizations’ security gaps, and how AppOmni’s SaaS security solution can help.

item.title: The Risks of OAuth Tokens and 3rd Party Apps to SaaS Security
item.description: Discover the risks posed by OAuth tokens and third-party apps to SaaS security in our insightful video.

item.title: OAuth Token: What It Is, How It Works, and Its Vulnerabilities
item.description: Learn how OAuth authentication works and the risks of improper OAuth implementation that may introduce attack vectors on your SaaS estate.

item.title: How Salesforce API Access Control Stops Rogue Apps Like UNC6040’s (ShinyHunters) Data Loader Attack
item.description: Learn how Salesforce API Access Control strengthens OAuth security by blocking rogue apps and preventing UNC6040-style attacks.

item.title: OAuth Grants and Phishing: A Deadly Combination
item.description: In this blog, you’ll learn how OAuth phishing works, why it's harder to detect than traditional attacks, and how to protect your accounts from unauthorized access.

item.title: AppOmni and Splunk SaaS: A Unified Front for Enhanced Security Insights
item.description: AppOmni and Splunk SaaS work together to elevate SaaS security with enriched insights, streamlined investigations, and advanced AI-driven detection.

item.title: Unmatched Salesforce Ecosystem Security: Shield and AppOmni
item.description: See how AppOmni and Salesforce Shield better protect your Salesforce environment.

item.title: How To Handle Increased Account Takeover Risks from Recent Credential Dumps
item.description: Credential-stuffing attacks are surging as billions of stolen logins resurface in Synthient’s data, putting SaaS and IdP accounts at higher risk of takeover.

item.title: Know Before You Go: AppOmni at RSAC 2025
item.description: Check out AppOmni at RSA Conference 2025 and read up on our top picks of sessions-to-watch. There’s a lot to choose from, but don’t worry we've narrowed it down for you!

item.title: Security Advisory: Salesforce Gainsight Incident
item.description: Salesforce detected suspicious activity involving Gainsight apps that could impact customer data. Read AppOmni’s recommendations for securing Salesforce-Gainsight integrations.

item.title: Securing AI in SaaS: No New Playbook Required
item.description: See how to secure AI in SaaS with AppOmni’s AI security solution, detailing discovery workflows and real-time anomaly detection.

item.title: What to Look for in SaaS Threat Detection
item.description: Read the blog for a better understanding of how to approach SaaS threat detection, what problems to look for, how to mitigate these problems and more.

item.title: Breadth vs. Depth in SaaS Security
item.description: Learn the difference between breadth vs depth in SaaS security and why AppOmni’s depth-first approach can help organizations achieve both breadth and depth in their security strategies.

item.title: What SaaS Apps Are You Really Using? And Why It Matters (More on SaaS Discovery)
item.description: Learn how AppOmni Discovery captures SaaS usage, monitors shadow IT, browser-based tools, AI apps, and unauthorized third-party integrations.

item.title: Start Smart, Scale Fast: AppOmni’s SaaS Security Packages Explained
item.description: Want to ensure your security team grows? AppOmni offers packages for building SaaS security maturity for your organization.

item.title: Detecting ShinyHunters/UNC6040 Vishing Campaigns in Salesforce OAuth Attacks
item.description: Learn how to detect and prevent vishing-driven OAuth attacks like UNC6040 in Salesforce using UEBA and proactive threat detection.

item.title: Better SaaS Security with AppOmni and Okta Identity Engine
item.description: Discover how AppOmni enhances the Okta Identity Engine (OIE) to provide your organization with robust SaaS security, featuring dynamic authorization and precise access control.

item.title: Sisense Customer Data Compromise: What to Know
item.description: Read about the Sisense data breach, implications of SaaS-to-SaaS connections (or third-party integrations), and how AppOmni can help.

item.title: Step-by-Step Guidance to Secure SaaS Environments including Snowflake and ServiceNow
item.description: Learn the chain of events behind the Snowflake breach and get guidance to secure your SaaS environments including Snowflake & ServiceNow.

item.title: Top 3 Security Priorities from Workday DevCon 2023
item.description: Discover how to bolster security in your Workday platform and how to effectively build a Workday SaaS security program.

item.title: AppOmni Achieves FedRAMP®️ “In Process” Status for Public Sector SaaS Security
item.description: AppOmni has achieved FedRAMP “In Process” status, a major milestone in providing secure SaaS solutions to federal agencies.

item.title: How AppOmni and Cisco Advance Zero Trust SaaS Security
item.description: Learn how AppOmni’s SSPM and Cisco’s SSE create a unified Zero Trust security solution, bridging SaaS and cloud service vulnerabilities to protect critical data.

item.title: AppOmni and Wiz Enable Unprecedented Cloud and SaaS Security Control
item.description: Learn how AppOmni and Wiz enable cyber risk visibility and security control across SaaS environments and cloud infrastructure.

item.title: The Power of SaaS Security in Phishing Defense
item.description: See why phishing attacks are a major, costly threat to organizations — and how SaaS security can thwart attacks and limit your exposure.

item.title: Product Update: Discover Unmonitored SaaS Applications via Identity Providers
item.description: See how AppOmni’s June 2023 product update provides unprecedented observability into your SaaS estate by discovering SaaS apps connected through identity providers.

item.title: How To Protect Legal SaaS Data: What Law Firms Need to Know
item.description: Read about why the legal sector experiences frequent SaaS breaches and how law firms can benefit from securing their SaaS environment with the help of AppOmni.

item.title: The Hidden SaaS Vulnerabilities in Your Apps: Are You Doing Due Diligence?
item.description: Uncover SaaS vulnerabilities and unseen security gaps that threaten your data. Learn how to improve SaaS due diligence and fix vulnerabilities with SaaS.

item.title: AppOmni and CrowdStrike Partner to Transform SaaS Security
item.description: Read the blog to see how CrowdStrike and AppOmni come together for a more secure SaaS environment for organizations.

item.title: From Policy to Practice: How to Operationalize SaaS Compliance at Scale
item.description: SaaS misconfigurations can lead to SaaS compliance failures and security risks. Learn how operationalizing compliance with AppOmni helps security teams enforce policies, monitor continuously, and stay audit-ready.
